templates.title: Run Manifest
templates.purpose: Canonical run identity, scope, authority, state, lineage, artifacts, metrics, and residuals.

templates.title: Evidence Register
templates.purpose: Trace factual claims, observations, sources, freshness, authority, contradictions, and confidence.

templates.title: Verification Record
templates.purpose: Record acceptance criteria, verification methods, exact results, limitations, and residual risk.

templates.title: Decision Record
templates.purpose: Capture decision context, alternatives, evidence, rationale, consequences, approval, and review date.

templates.title: Artifact Specification
templates.purpose: Define exact artifact purpose, audience, inputs, constraints, structure, quality gates, and export requirements.

templates.title: Acceptance Criteria
templates.purpose: Define observable, testable completion conditions with verification ownership and evidence.

templates.title: Review Receipt
templates.purpose: Record reviewer identity, decision, findings, required revisions, artifact hash, and timestamp.

templates.title: Rollback and Recovery Plan
templates.purpose: Define preconditions, backups, rollback steps, verification, residuals, and escalation.

templates.title: Complete README
templates.purpose: Repository landing page with verified quickstart, concepts, navigation, support, and lifecycle links.

templates.title: User Manual
templates.purpose: Task-oriented end-user manual from first success through advanced workflows and recovery.

templates.title: Administrator Manual
templates.purpose: Administrative setup, identity, policy, configuration, maintenance, security, and recovery.

templates.title: Operator Runbook
templates.purpose: Operational procedures, health, monitoring, incident response, backup, recovery, and escalation.

templates.title: Developer Guide
templates.purpose: Architecture-aware development setup, code navigation, workflows, debugging, testing, and extension.

templates.title: Contributor Guide
templates.purpose: Contribution workflow, standards, tests, review, commits, releases, and governance.

templates.title: Maintainer Guide
templates.purpose: Ownership, triage, dependency management, release, compatibility, deprecation, and support.

templates.title: Configuration Reference
templates.purpose: Complete configuration concepts, fields, types, defaults, precedence, validation, security, and examples.

templates.title: CLI Reference
templates.purpose: Command hierarchy, syntax, flags, defaults, environment interaction, outputs, exit codes, and examples.

templates.title: API Reference
templates.purpose: Endpoint or callable contracts, authentication, schemas, errors, pagination, compatibility, and examples.

templates.title: SDK Reference
templates.purpose: Package setup, public interfaces, types, lifecycle, errors, threading, examples, and compatibility.

templates.title: Architecture Guide
templates.purpose: System context, components, boundaries, data flows, state, deployment, trust, trade-offs, and extension.

templates.title: System Design Document
templates.purpose: Requirements, architecture, interfaces, data model, reliability, security, trade-offs, rollout, and verification.

templates.title: Troubleshooting Guide
templates.purpose: Symptom-led diagnostics with evidence collection, decision trees, recovery, prevention, and escalation.

templates.title: Security Guide
templates.purpose: Threat model, trust boundaries, controls, secrets, permissions, hardening, response, and disclosure.

templates.title: Privacy and Data Handling Guide
templates.purpose: Data inventory, purposes, minimization, retention, access, deletion, transfer, and incident handling.

templates.title: Deployment Guide
templates.purpose: Environment preparation, configuration, rollout, validation, observability, rollback, and operations handoff.

templates.title: Release Guide
templates.purpose: Release readiness, versioning, packaging, signing, SBOM, publication, verification, and rollback.

templates.title: Migration Guide
templates.purpose: Source and target states, prerequisites, mapping, dry run, execution, validation, rollback, and reconciliation.

templates.title: Upgrade Guide
templates.purpose: Compatibility, prerequisites, backups, staged upgrade, validation, rollback, and post-upgrade checks.

templates.title: Built Binary and Distribution Manual
templates.purpose: Binary provenance, platforms, installation, files, commands, runtime behavior, diagnostics, update, and removal.

templates.title: Testing Guide
templates.purpose: Test architecture, environments, commands, fixtures, coverage, flakiness, CI, and troubleshooting.

templates.title: Performance Guide
templates.purpose: Benchmarks, workloads, metrics, profiling, tuning, capacity, regressions, and safe optimization.

templates.title: Observability Guide
templates.purpose: Signals, instrumentation, dashboards, alerts, SLOs, diagnosis, retention, privacy, and runbooks.

templates.title: Data Model Reference
templates.purpose: Entities, fields, relationships, constraints, lifecycle, lineage, migrations, and query examples.

templates.title: Glossary and Terminology
templates.purpose: Canonical terms, aliases, prohibited ambiguity, ownership, sources, and cross-links.

templates.title: Frequently Asked Questions
templates.purpose: Evidence-grounded answers organized by audience, task, failure mode, and lifecycle stage.

templates.title: Architecture Decision Record
templates.purpose: Decision context, forces, options, decision, consequences, evidence, status, and supersession.

templates.title: Decision Log
templates.purpose: Chronological decision index with owners, evidence, outcomes, follow-ups, and linked ADRs.

templates.title: Knowledge Base Article
templates.purpose: Single-problem support article with symptoms, environment, cause, resolution, verification, and escalation.

templates.title: Standard Operating Procedure
templates.purpose: Controlled procedure with roles, prerequisites, steps, controls, records, exceptions, and review.

templates.title: Policy Document
templates.purpose: Purpose, scope, principles, mandatory rules, roles, exceptions, enforcement, evidence, and review.

templates.title: Technical Specification
templates.purpose: Normative behavior, interfaces, types, constraints, errors, algorithms, examples, and conformance.

templates.title: Requirements Specification
templates.purpose: Goals, actors, functional and non-functional requirements, constraints, traceability, and acceptance.

templates.title: Project Handoff
templates.purpose: Current state, architecture, operations, ownership, access, risks, decisions, backlog, and acceptance.

templates.title: Onboarding Guide
templates.purpose: Role-specific setup, concepts, first tasks, access, standards, support, and learning path.

templates.title: Support Playbook
templates.purpose: Intake, severity, evidence, diagnosis, communications, escalation, resolution, and learning.

templates.title: Presentation Master
templates.purpose: Full deck system with audience, narrative arc, slide contracts, evidence, visual language, and delivery notes.

templates.title: Executive Brief Deck
templates.purpose: Concise decision deck with context, evidence, options, recommendation, risks, and asks.

templates.title: Project Kickoff Deck
templates.purpose: Goals, scope, users, workstreams, roles, milestones, risks, decisions, and next steps.

templates.title: Technical Architecture Deck
templates.purpose: System context, components, flows, interfaces, deployment, security, trade-offs, and roadmap.

templates.title: Research Findings Deck
templates.purpose: Question, method, evidence, findings, contradictions, implications, recommendations, and limitations.

templates.title: Product Strategy Deck
templates.purpose: Market and user context, choices, positioning, priorities, roadmap, metrics, and risks.

templates.title: Board Update Deck
templates.purpose: Performance, strategic progress, material risks, financial view, decisions, and governance asks.

templates.title: Investor Update Deck
templates.purpose: Progress, metrics, market, product, financials, milestones, risks, and capital narrative.

templates.title: Training and Workshop Deck
templates.purpose: Learning outcomes, concepts, demonstrations, exercises, checks, facilitation, and resources.

templates.title: Incident Review Deck
templates.purpose: Impact, timeline, response, causes, controls, actions, owners, and learning.

templates.title: Release Readiness Deck
templates.purpose: Scope, quality, security, operations, rollout, rollback, risks, approvals, and go/no-go.

templates.title: Design Review Deck
templates.purpose: Problem, users, principles, flows, alternatives, accessibility, evidence, decisions, and open questions.

templates.title: Data Story Deck
templates.purpose: Decision question, data provenance, narrative sequence, visual encodings, uncertainty, and actions.

templates.title: Professional Report
templates.purpose: Decision-ready report with executive summary, method, evidence, analysis, findings, recommendations, and appendices.

templates.title: Audit Report
templates.purpose: Scope, criteria, evidence, findings, severity, root causes, recommendations, management response, and closure.

templates.title: Research Report
templates.purpose: Research question, methods, sources, evidence synthesis, findings, uncertainty, implications, and bibliography.

templates.title: Incident Report
templates.purpose: Incident facts, impact, timeline, response, cause analysis, corrective actions, evidence, and follow-up.

templates.title: Security Assessment
templates.purpose: Scope, authorization, threat context, methods, findings, evidence, severity, remediation, and residual risk.

templates.title: Executive Report
templates.purpose: Performance, trends, explanations, decisions, risks, priorities, and accountable next actions.

templates.title: Experiment Analysis
templates.purpose: Hypothesis, design, data quality, analysis, results, uncertainty, decision, and follow-up.

templates.title: Evaluation Report
templates.purpose: Object, criteria, method, evidence, scores, findings, limitations, recommendation, and improvement plan.

templates.title: Compliance Report
templates.purpose: Applicable obligations, control mapping, evidence, gaps, exceptions, remediation, attestations, and review.

templates.title: Status Report
templates.purpose: Objectives, progress, completed work, metrics, blockers, risks, decisions, and next period.

templates.title: Visual Asset Brief
templates.purpose: Purpose, audience, message, medium, dimensions, composition, style, accessibility, source, and export.

templates.title: Infographic Specification
templates.purpose: Information hierarchy, data, narrative, visual grammar, annotations, accessibility, and formats.

templates.title: Diagram Specification
templates.purpose: System semantics, nodes, relationships, layout, notation, labels, accessibility, and editability.

templates.title: Data Visualization Specification
templates.purpose: Question, data, transformations, encodings, scales, uncertainty, interaction, accessibility, and validation.

templates.title: Animated Illustration Specification
templates.purpose: Story, states, timing, motion rules, controls, reduced motion, implementation, and export.
